name: IRC_CMT_LAUNCH_CONTENTS
description: This table stores message content information for the launch.

columns.Name: CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: BODY_SEARCH_TEXT
columns.Comments: Message body in plain text for text search

columns.Name: SUBJECT_SEARCH_TEXT
columns.Comments: Subject in plain text for text search

columns.Name: LAUNCH_ID
columns.Comments: Stores LAUNCH_ID. Foreign Key to IRC_CMT_LAUNCH.

columns.Name: SUBJECT
columns.Comments: Stores subject part for the message.

columns.Name: BODY
columns.Comments: Stores body part for the message.

columns.Name: COMMON_TOKENS
columns.Comments: Stores common token values for the launch in JSON format.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SENDER_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Sender's email address, which will be used to communicate with the sender.

columns.Name: SENDER_DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: This field holds the display name of the sender.

columns.Name: REPLY_TO_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email address to which the reply email can be sent.

columns.Name: REPLY_TO_DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: Display Name of the email to which the reply email can be sent.

columns.Name: IS_DEFAULT
columns.Comments: Specifies the contents are default if the preferred language is not available.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
